ccfe-000002122: Cloud computing relies on China Mobile's high-quality computing resources and advanced virtualization technology to present the computing, storage, and network capabilities of the cloud to end users in the form of computer desktops, creating a one-stop, agile, efficient, secure, and reliable cloud office space for users. It can be widely used in enterprise office scenarios with high data security control, efficient desktop operation and maintenance requirements.
ccfe-000002125: Provide standardized computer services for Internet users and enterprise users
ccfe-000002127: To create a fully innovative, secure, and controllable integrated solution for domestic enterprise users in the field of information technology and cloud computing
ccfe-000002129: Targeting fields such as education, healthcare, and government affairs, we aim to create cost-effective and lightly customized cloud computing solutions for the industry
ccfe-000002131: Provide standardized computer services to enterprise users with design, rendering, and other needs

ccfe-000002493: For instances of manual unsubscribe, you can choose to add them to the recycle bin and keep them for 7 days without charge. During this period, you can restore them. After 7 days, these instances will be completely released and cannot be restored.
ccfe-000002494: Each resource pool in the recycle bin is limited to 20 instances. If it exceeds the limit, it is not possible to continue joining the recycle bin, and the resources in the recycle bin must be released.
